summary: Completed testing of Quiz Categories System. Backend: 11/11 tests passed. All 4 quiz categories (GOSSIP, CULTURA, CINEMA, MUSICA) working correctly. Category selection flow verified: spin wheel -> choose category -> answer question. Frontend: Premi page loads with key UI elements (PREMI IN PALIO, countdown, subscription warning). Prize section appears only once (no duplicates).

ui_bugs.issue: Shows 'undefined possibilità di vincere!' instead of proper text when biglietti_utente is 0

integration_issues.issue: 403 error when loading lottery data without authentication - page navigates to /premi before auth completes

action_items: Fix 'undefined possibilità di vincere!' text when biglietti_utente is 0 or undefined
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/quiz/today correctly returns needs_category=true with 4 categorie objects when user spun wheel but hasn't chosen category
GET /api/quiz/today correctly returns needs_category=false with reason=no_spin when user hasn't spun the wheel
POST /api/quiz/select-category correctly accepts valid categories (gossip, cultura, cinema, musica)
POST /api/quiz/select-category correctly rejects invalid categories with 400
POST /api/quiz/select-category correctly rejects if user hasn't spun wheel with 400
POST /api/quiz/answer correctly uses the selected category to lookup the correct question
POST /api/quiz/answer correctly saves categoria in quiz_answers collection
Quiz questions are from the new categories (GOSSIP, CULTURA, CINEMA, MUSICA) - verified with gossip question about David Beckham
Frontend API service has selectQuizCategory method at line 311
Frontend premi.tsx correctly implements category selection UI with handleSelectCategory function
Frontend correctly hides quiz/wheel sections for admin users (!isAdmin checks)
Prize section appears only ONCE (no duplicates verified)

success_rate.frontend: 95% - Core features working, minor text display issue

seed_data_creation: Temporary wheel_spins, quiz_category_choices, and quiz_answers records created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Quiz Categories System fully tested. Backend endpoints: GET /api/quiz/today (returns needs_category=true with 4 categories after wheel spin), POST /api/quiz/select-category (accepts gossip/cultura/cinema/musica), POST /api/quiz/answer (saves categoria field). Frontend: premi.tsx has category selection UI with categorySelectionCard and handleSelectCategory. API service has selectQuizCategory method. Quiz is hidden for admin users. To test full flow, insert wheel_spins record first, then test category selection and answer.
tested_features: GET /api/quiz/today - returns needs_category=true with 4 categorie objects when user spun wheel
GET /api/quiz/today - returns needs_category=false with reason=no_spin when no wheel spin
POST /api/quiz/select-category - accepts valid categories (gossip, cultura, cinema, musica)
POST /api/quiz/select-category - rejects if user hasn't spun wheel with 400
POST /api/quiz/answer - uses selected category to lookup correct question
POST /api/quiz/answer - saves categoria in quiz_answers collection
Quiz questions from new categories (verified GOSSIP question about David Beckham)
Frontend: Premi page loads with PREMI IN PALIO section
Frontend: Prize section appears only ONCE (no duplicates)
Frontend: API service has selectQuizCategory method

response.message: Gira prima la ruota per sbloccare il Quiz Bonus!
